name: Garry's Mod Dedicated Server
description: Garry's Mod dedicated server, installed via SteamCMD (anonymous).

configFiles.description: Server configuration (server.cfg etc.), created after first run

notes: Public (internet-visible) servers need a Steam Game Server Login Token (GSLT) from https://steamcommunity.com/dev/managegameservers (generate it against the base game, appid 4000) - add "+sv_setsteamaccount" and your token as extra startup arguments in the startup editor. Needs 32-bit compat libraries (lib32gcc-s1, lib32stdc++6), already installed by scripts/install.sh for SteamCMD. Workshop addons can be added via +host_workshop_collection in extra startup arguments.
